plugins.name: gaia-security
plugins.description: Security framework for Claude Code. Classifies commands by risk tier and requires approval for mutative operations via hooks. Note: modifies .claude/settings.json. Restart session after first install.

plugins.name: gaia-ops
plugins.description: DevOps orchestrator for Claude Code. Security gates, specialized agents (cloud, terraform, gitops, devops), project context injection, and audit. Note: modifies .claude/settings.json. Restart session after first install.
